content:
--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -345,44 +345,89 @@
-  KNIGHT_SPRITE,
-  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map(line => line), // breathing offset applied in drawCharacter
-  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')), // blinking eyes
-  // sword sway: shift sword pixels one char right and left in frames 3 and 4
-  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map((line, i) => {
-    if (i >= 6 && i <= 8) {
-      // shift sword pixels right by 1 (replace 'P' with ' ' at pos 5, add 'P' at pos 6)
-      return line.substring(0,5) + ' ' + line[5] + line.substring(6);
-    }
-    return line;
-  }),
-];
-
-const HEALER_IDLE_FRAMES = [
-  HEALER_SPRITE,
-  HEALER_SPRITE.map(line => line),
-  HEALER_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
-  HEALER_SPRITE,
-];
-
-const SENTINEL_IDLE_FRAMES = [
-  SENTINEL_SPRITE,
-  SENTINEL_SPRITE.map(line => line),
-  SENTINEL_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
-  SENTINEL_SPRITE,
-];
-
-const NOBILITY_IDLE_FRAMES = [
-  NOBILITY_SPRITE,
-  NOBILITY_SPRITE.map(line => line),
-  NOBILITY_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
-  NOBILITY_SPRITE,
-];
-
-const SQUIRE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
-  SQUIRE_SPRITE,
-  SQUIRE_SPRITE.map(line => line),
-  SQUIRE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
-  SQUIRE_SPRITE,
-];
-
-const SCRIBE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
-  SCRIBE_SPRITE,
-  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line),
-  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
-  // page turn: simulate by toggling 'T' to 't' in frame 4
-  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace(/T/g, 't')),
-];
-
-const JUDGE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
-  JUDGE_SPRITE,
-  JUDGE_SPRITE.map(line => line),
-  JUDGE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
-  JUDGE_SPRITE,
-];
-
-const BLACKSMITH_IDLE_FRAMES = [
-  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE,
-  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map(line => line),
-  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
-  // hammer sway: shift 'M' chars left and right in frame 4
-  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map((line, i) => {
-    if (i === 8 || i === 9) {
-      return line.substring(0,4) + line[5] + 'M' + line.substring(7);
-    }
-    return line;
-  }),
-];
-
-const IDLE_FRAMES_MAP: Record<CharacterType, string[][]> = {
-  king: KING_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  knight: KNIGHT_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  healer: HEALER_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  sentinel: SENTINEL_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  nobility: NOBILITY_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  squire: SQUIRE_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  scribe: SCRIBE_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  judge: JUDGE_IDLE_FRAMES,
-  blacksmith: BLACKSMITH_IDLE_FRAMES,
-};
+const KNIGHT_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE,
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map(line => line), // breathing offset applied in drawCharacter
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')), // blinking eyes
+  // sword sway: shift sword pixels right by 1 in frame 4
+  KNIGHT_SPRITE.map((line, i) => {
+    if (i >= 6 && i <= 8) {
+      // shift sword pixels right by 1 (replace 'P' with ' ' at pos 5, add 'P' at pos 6)
+      if (line[5] === 'P') {
+        return line.substring(0,5) + ' ' + 'P' + line.substring(6);
+      }
+    }
+    return line;
+  }),
+];
+
+const HEALER_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  HEALER_SPRITE,
+  HEALER_SPRITE.map(line => line),
+  HEALER_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
+  HEALER_SPRITE,
+];
+
+const SENTINEL_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE,
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE.map(line => line),
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
+  SENTINEL_SPRITE,
+];
+
+const NOBILITY_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE,
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE.map(line => line),
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
+  NOBILITY_SPRITE,
+];
+
+const SQUIRE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE,
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE.map(line => line),
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
+  SQUIRE_SPRITE,
+];
+
+const SCRIBE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE,
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line),
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
+  // page turn: simulate by toggling 'T' to 't' in frame 4
+  SCRIBE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace(/T/g, 't')),
+];
+
+const JUDGE_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  JUDGE_SPRITE,
+  JUDGE_SPRITE.map(line => line),
+  JUDGE_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
+  JUDGE_SPRITE,
+];
+
+const BLACKSMITH_IDLE_FRAMES = [
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE,
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map(line => line),
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map(line => line.replace('O', '0')),
+  // hammer sway: shift 'M' chars left and right in frame 4
+  BLACKSMITH_SPRITE.map((line, i) => {
+    if (i === 8 || i === 9) {
+      // shift hammer 'M' right by 1 (swap pos 4 and 5)
+      if (line[4] === 'M') {
+        return line.substring(0,4) + ' ' + 'M' + line.substring(6);
+      }
+    }
+    return line;
+  }),
+];
+
+const IDLE_FRAMES_MAP: Record<CharacterType, string[][]> = {
+  king: KING_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  knight: KNIGHT_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  healer: HEALER_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  sentinel: SENTINEL_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  nobility: NOBILITY_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  squire: SQUIRE_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  scribe: SCRIBE_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  judge: JUDGE_IDLE_FRAMES,
+  blacksmith: BLACKSMITH_IDLE_FRAMES,
+};
@@ -890,6 +935,37 @@
-}
+}
+
+/**
+ * Draw a character with idle animation frames, breathing, blinking, and role-specific idle motions.
+ * @param ctx CanvasRenderingContext2D
+ * @param characterType CharacterType string
+ * @param palette Palette map for colors
+ * @param x X position on canvas
+ * @param y Y position on canvas
+ * @param s Scale factor
+ * @param timestamp Current timestamp for animation frame calculation
+ * @param flipH Flip horizontally
+ */
+export function drawCharacter(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  characterType: CharacterType,
+  palette: Record<string, string>,
+  x: number,
+  y: number,
+  s: number,
+  timestamp: number,
+  flipH = false,
+) {
+  const frames = IDLE_FRAMES_MAP[characterType];
+  if (!frames) return;
+
+  const frameIndex = getIdleAnimationFrame(timestamp);
+  const spriteFrame = frames[frameIndex];
+
+  // Breathing offset: subtle vertical offset oscillating every 800ms
+  const breathPeriod = 800;
+  const breathPhase = (timestamp % breathPeriod) / breathPeriod;
+  // offset oscillates between -1 and +1 pixels
+  const yOffset = Math.round(Math.sin(breathPhase * 2 * Math.PI));
+
+  drawSpriteDef(ctx, spriteFrame, palette, x, y, s, flipH, yOffset);
+}
+
